summary: Bright, crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a tight 1982 second set highlighted by soaring China > Rider and an uplifting Iko Iko.
review: The recording is a bright‑sounding soundboard that delivers excellent clarity throughout the show. Reviewers rave about the tightly arranged second set, noting high‑energy performances of China > Rider, Samson & Delilah, High Time, Estimated, He's Gone and an uplifting Iko Iko leading into a haunting Black Peter and Bertha finale.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are highly favorable (4‑5 stars), praising both the musical tightness of the show and the outstanding soundboard quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bright, clear mix with strong drum presence; no reported dropouts or major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is packed with high‑energy gems before the Drumz/Space segment, flowing smoothly from upbeat numbers into more contemplative closers.

band_member_comments.Jerry: High‑energy guitar work noted throughout the set.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drummer’s sound is bright and exceptionally well‑played.
